description: Set's the active field of the provided Instance slot upon calling * (Call). The Active (bool) value must be provided for this node to work.

fields.* ([[Impulses|Call]]): Call this to set the Instance (Slot)'s active field to Active (bool).
fields.Instance: Slot to set the property for.
fields.Active: The value to set Instance (Slot)'s active field to when * (Call) is called.
fields.Next: Sends an impulse after * (Call) is called and Instance (Slot)'s active field was set to Active (bool).
